description: Vertical slogan poster. The background is a photograph of a single American flag flying on a tall flagpole against a blue sky, with bare winter treetops along the bottom. Centered at top is the white line-art seal of the U.S. Department of Labor ('Department of Labor / United States of America'). Below it, large white serif typography reads 'AMERICAN WORKERS' on one line and a larger italic 'FIRST' on the second line. The accompanying tweet describes a proposed rule to reduce incentives to replace American workers with 'low-wage foreign visa labor.'
